SEARCH
程序包 mypakege

枚举类 Course

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<Course>
mypakege.Course
所有已实现的接口:
Serializable, Comparable<Course>, Constable
public enum Course extends Enum<Course>
Enum representing the predefined courses in the registration system. Each course has a course code, credit hours, a minimum standing prerequisite, and an optional "major only" restriction.
作者:
HIrotaku Hayashi hh635, junjie Xia jx309

  • 嵌套类概要

    • code

  • 构造器详细资料

    • Course

      private Course(String code, int credits, Standing minStanding, Major majorOnly)
      Constructs a Course enum value with its course information.
      参数:
      code - the course code (e.g., "CS100")
      credits - the number of credits for the course
      minStanding - the minimum standing required to enroll
      majorOnly - the required major if the course is restricted; null if no major restriction

  • 方法详细资料

    • values

      public static Course[] values()
      返回包含该枚举类的常量的数组， 顺序与声明这些常量的顺序相同
      返回:
      包含该枚举类的常量的数组，顺序与声明这些常量的顺序相同

    • valueOf

      public static Course valueOf(String name)
      返回带有指定名称的该类的枚举常量。 字符串必须与用于声明该类的枚举常量的 标识符完全匹配。（不允许有多余 的空格字符。）
      参数:
      name - 要返回的枚举常量的名称。
      返回:
      返回带有指定名称的枚举常量
      抛出:
      IllegalArgumentException - 如果该枚举类没有带有指定名称的常量
      NullPointerException - 如果参数为空值

    • getCode

      public String getCode()
      Returns the course code (e.g., "CS100").
      返回:
      the course code

    • getCredits

      public int getCredits()
      Returns the number of credits for this course.
      返回:
      the credit hours

    • getMinStanding

      public Standing getMinStanding()
      Returns the minimum standing required to enroll in this course.
      返回:
      the minimum required standing

    • getMajorOnly

      public Major getMajorOnly()
      Returns the major restriction for this course.
      返回:
      the required major if restricted; null if not restricted to a major

    • from

      public static Course from(String token)
      Converts a user input token into a matching Course enum value. The lookup is case-insensitive (e.g., "cs100" matches CS100).
      参数:
      token - the input token representing a course code
      返回:
      the corresponding Course if found; otherwise null
